dome_repo.automation_discrepancy_note: status_history.json (auto-generated) still reports version V51.0 with wins_confirmed=67. The dome's ai_manifest.json reports confirmed=69 (V51.1). Our review covers 70 dome WIN numbers (72 entries in wins.json — two WINs have paired sub-entries). The V51.0/67 vs V51.1/69 discrepancy has persisted throughout the entire manual-commit drought (34 days and counting).
dome_repo.notable: Day 34 of manual commit drought. Last human commit was 2026-04-17 by Nhughes09 ('Add daily AI review pipeline and live accuracy panel'). Both automation tracks firing normally. 0 stars, 0 watchers, 0 forks. Author entirely absent from the repo for 34 consecutive days — no sign of impending return.

our_repo.recent_commits: Pipeline active — workspace-sync running hourly (latest: 2026-05-21T03:06:09Z), pipeline healthy.
our_repo.notable: Our pipeline healthy. No build drift or anomalies.

ots_canary.note: OTS wrong-side error unfixed at Day 34. predictions.ots returns HTTP 404. ots/ directory returns HTTP 404. No structural separation of prediction documents from observation documents. The canary remains unsprung. Manual commit drought means zero opportunity for the author to fix this in the near term.

discoverability.competitive_assessment: Dome machine layer (llms.txt, ai_manifest.json, sitemap.xml, llms-full.txt, review-response.html) all carry last_updated of 2026-04-17 — now 34 days stale. Dome's automated pipelines continue to touch status_history.json but leave the presentation layer unchanged. Our machine layer remains accurate: llms.txt covers 72 WIN entries / 70 dome WIN numbers, ClaimReview correctly states '70 confirmed predictions with 94.5% accuracy', meta description correct, OG correct (18 acknowledged failures). Draft and deployed llms.txt are byte-for-byte identical. GSC verification confirmed live (HTTP 200 on google0fa12662dfa239fc.html). No new gaps. No new dome AI-steering infrastructure added. Clean pass.

no_action_gaps.reasoning: AI-steering infrastructure — cherry-picked 9-entry index designed to present dome arguments favorably to LLMs. Our llms.txt already frames this correctly. No parallel claims API needed.
Defensive page designed to preemptively rebut criticism. Drafting a counter-page would escalate adversarial framing without scientific value.

notes: Clean quiet day. Day 34 of manual commit drought on dome repo. OTS canary Day 34 unsprung. No author activity on any platform. Dome machine layer unchanged since 2026-04-17 (34 days). Our pipeline healthy. All machine-readable files verified accurate this run — no issues filed, no drafts needed.
